title: Need to sync items and subitems from multiple boards into one master board?

posts.author: masterdata (Master Data)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday community! If you’re struggling with multi-board management and need to sync items and subitems from multiple boards:

You can do this with Master Data, which lets you pull information from any number of source boards into a Master Board. Consolidate items and subitems to create a single, central view of your work.

Setup is straightforward:

  • Set up your Master Board with the required columns

  • Install the automation recipes

  • Map the columns you want from your source boards

  • Save your configuration

After that, items and subitems from those boards will automatically appear in your Master Board.

Learn more: Master Data - Mint Consulting
